name: Owlin
summary:
Distant kin of giant owls from the Feywild, owlin come in many shapes and sizes, from petite and fluffy to wide-winged and majestic. Owlin have arms and legs like other Humanoids, as well as wings that extend from their back and shoulders.
Like owls, owlin are graced with feathers that make no sound when they move or fly, making it easy for them to sneak up on you in the library.
Your owlin character might be nocturnal. Or perhaps your character is simply prone to rise later, embodying the common nickname of night owl.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Increase one ability score by 2, and increase a different one by 1.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.

coreTraits.name: Your owlin character might be nocturnal
coreTraits.summary: Or perhaps your character is simply prone to rise later, embodying the common nickname of night owl.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: You can see in dim light within 120 feet of yourself as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

coreTraits.name: Flight
coreTraits.summary: Thanks to your wings, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can't use this flying speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.

coreTraits.name: Silent Feathers
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.
